new_findings.pattern: I thought fast shipping was promised?
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about expectations of fast shipping does not appear in the real samples.

new_findings.pattern: I distinctly remember seeing the confirmation email about it.
new_findings.rationale: This detailed expression of memory regarding a confirmation email is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: I want to ensure I follow the correct steps.
new_findings.rationale: This phrase about ensuring correct procedural adherence is not found in the real samples.
